overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting navigation from the bridge of a vessel during a nighttime storm. The ship encounters lightning and changing water depths while the crew monitors radar, GPS, and depth sounder displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open ocean in storm conditions

agents.ego_description: Navigating the vessel through rough seas while monitoring the radar sweep and depth sounder displays

entered.detail: The bow of the ship with red deck surface and white railings visible through the bridge windows
White metal railing along the left side of the foredeck
White metal railing along the right side of the foredeck
Array of three navigation monitors displaying radar, GPS chart, and depth sounder data
Circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding contacts
GPS navigation screen showing chart data with cyan background
Depth finder display showing deep water conditions in blue
Dark stormy sea meeting the night sky with visible wave action

segments.scene_description: The ship's bridge view shows steady forward movement through choppy dark waters. The navigation console displays an active radar sweep and deep water readings. The stormy horizon is visible ahead with rough wave conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating through lightning storm with shallow water approach

events.description: Lightning strikes on the port side, briefly illuminating the rough seas and storm clouds

agents.ego_description: Continuing navigation through the intense storm after the lightning strike, monitoring the depth sounder as readings change to indicate shallower water

segments.scene_description: A lightning bolt strikes the ocean on the port side, creating a bright flash that illuminates the stormy scene. The depth sounder display changes from blue to brown, indicating the ship is entering shallower waters while continuing through the rough seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the ship's bridge through a dark, stormy ocean that transitions from deep waters to a shallower coastal zone. It begins with a steady view of choppy dark waters and a stormy horizon, while the navigation console shows an active radar sweep and deep water readings. As the vessel pushes forward through the rough seas, a sudden lightning bolt strikes the ocean on the port side, momentarily illuminating the scene with a bright flash. The perspective then shifts focus to the depth sounder display, which changes from blue to brown to signal the ship's entry into shallower waters.
